title: Server Actions
description: Callable server functions from the client.

options: A function you call from the client that runs on the server
questions.explanation: Bundlers generate a client stub that makes the network call.

questions.prompt: You mark a server action with:
options: 'use server' at the top of the file OR inside the function
questions.explanation: Directive tells the bundler this code stays on the server.

options: You can't use forms with actions
Boilerplate loading/error state around actions (was useFormState)
questions.explanation: Provides state, dispatch action, and isPending.
